title: synaedrys pseudomolucca
intro: Synaedrys pseudomolucca, also known as the pseudomolucca or Chinese yew, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. The bark and leaves of this plant contain tannins, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Synaedrys pseudomolucca include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness their medicinal properties.
